$comment: Frozen contract fixture for the agent-dispatch (adsp) dispatch_task seam, consumed by test/agents.test.mjs. Snapshot of the live `agent-dispatch digest` task-class IDs plus the dispatch_task response-shape contract. Tests validate the mp-* wrapper agents against THIS checked-in file, never against a live sibling-repo path. If agent-dispatch renames or removes a task class, re-freeze this fixture deliberately.

request.class: optional task-class string in the descriptor; declared class always wins over auto-classification

response.$comment: dispatch_task returns a schema-free structured JSON payload: whatever verdict vocabulary the dispatched brief declares comes back verbatim. This is why the masterplan review wrappers route through dispatch_task rather than a fixed-record review lane whose record could not carry their output contracts.
